title: Promotions API
description: The Promotions API enables businesses to manage, update and retrieve promotional campaigns effectively.

apis.heading: Create Promotion
apis.description: The Create Promotion API enables users to create new marketing promotions by defining attributes such as title, content, schedule, and priority.

reqParams.name: merchantId
reqParams.description: The unique identifier for the merchant creating the promotion.

reqParams.name: title
reqParams.description: The title of the promotion.

reqParams.name: name
reqParams.description: The name of the promotion.

reqParams.name: description
reqParams.description: A brief description of the promotion.

reqParams.name: assetUrl
reqParams.description: URL of the promotion image.

reqParams.name: assetOpacity
reqParams.description: Opacity level of the promotional asset, ranging from 0 (fully transparent) to 1 (fully opaque).

reqParams.name: backgroundColor
reqParams.description: Background color for the promotion, in hex format.

reqParams.name: contentTextColor
reqParams.description: Text color for the promotional content, in hex format.

reqParams.name: endProductUrl
reqParams.description: URL of the product linked to the promotion.

reqParams.name: endProduct
reqParams.description: Product ID associated with the promotion.

reqParams.name: buttonLabel
reqParams.description: The label for the action button in the promotion.

reqParams.name: priority
reqParams.description: The priority of the promotion, where lower numbers indicate higher priority.

reqParams.name: type
reqParams.description: The type of promotion.

possibleValues.description: Promotion displayed in a large spot on the receipt.
Promotion displayed in a small spot on the receipt.
Promotion displayed on the idle screen in a large spot.

reqParams.name: startDate
reqParams.description: The start date of the promotion in 'MM-DD-YYYY' format.

reqParams.name: endDate
reqParams.description: The end date of the promotion in 'MM-DD-YYYY' format.

resParams.name: status
resParams.description: Status of the request, indicated as either 'SUCCESS' or 'ERROR'.

resParams.name: data
resParams.description: Response data

resParams.name: promotionId
resParams.description: Unique identifier of the promotion.

resParams.name: message
resParams.description: A message that describes the status of the request.

apis.heading: Update Promotion
apis.description: The Update Promotion API allows users to modify existing marketing promotions by updating attributes.

reqParams.name: merchantId
reqParams.description: The unique identifier for the merchant updating the promotion.

reqParams.name: title
reqParams.description: The title of the promotional campaign.

reqParams.name: name
reqParams.description: The name of the promotional campaign.

reqParams.name: description
reqParams.description: A brief description of the promotion.

reqParams.name: assetUrl
reqParams.description: URL of the promotion image.

reqParams.name: assetOpacity
reqParams.description: Opacity level of the promotional asset, ranging from 0 (fully transparent) to 1 (fully opaque).

reqParams.name: backgroundColor
reqParams.description: Background color for the promotion, in hex format.

reqParams.name: contentTextColor
reqParams.description: Text color for the promotional content, in hex format.

reqParams.name: endProductUrl
reqParams.description: URL of the product linked to the promotion.

reqParams.name: endProduct
reqParams.description: Product ID associated with the promotion.

reqParams.name: buttonLabel
reqParams.description: The label for the action button in the promotion.

reqParams.name: priority
reqParams.description: The priority of the promotion, where lower numbers indicate higher priority.

reqParams.name: campaignType
reqParams.description: The type of promotion, such as 'RECEIPT_BIG' or 'RECEIPT_SMALL'.

reqParams.name: startDate
reqParams.description: The start date of the promotion in 'MM-DD-YYYY' format.

reqParams.name: endDate
reqParams.description: The end date of the promotion in 'MM-DD-YYYY' format.

resParams.name: status
resParams.description: Status of the request, indicated as either 'SUCCESS' or 'ERROR'.

resParams.name: message
resParams.description: A message that describes the status of the request.

apis.heading: Fetch Promotion by ID
apis.description: The Fetch Promotion by ID API retrieves detailed information about a specific promotion using its unique promotion ID.

resParams.name: status
resParams.description: Status of the request, indicated as either 'SUCCESS' or 'ERROR'.

resParams.name: data
resParams.description: Response data

resParams.name: promotionId
resParams.description: Unique identifier of the promotion.

resParams.name: merchantId
resParams.description: Unique identifier of the merchant associated with the promotion.

resParams.name: name
resParams.description: Name of the promotion.

resParams.name: title
resParams.description: Title of the promotion.

resParams.name: description
resParams.description: Description of the promotion.

resParams.name: storeId
resParams.description: Unique identifier of the store where the promotion is running.

resParams.name: assetUrl
resParams.description: URL of the promotion image.

resParams.name: endProduct
resParams.description: Product ID associated with the promotion.

resParams.name: buttonLabel
resParams.description: Label for the action button in the promotion.

resParams.name: startDate
resParams.description: Start date of the promotion in ISO 8601 format.

resParams.name: endDate
resParams.description: End date of the promotion in ISO 8601 format.

resParams.name: priority
resParams.description: Priority of the promotion, where lower numbers represent higher priority.

resParams.name: assetOpacity
resParams.description: Opacity of the promotion image, ranging from 0 (fully transparent) to 1 (fully opaque).

resParams.name: backgroundColor
resParams.description: Background color for the promotion, in hex format.

resParams.name: contentTextColor
resParams.description: Text color for the promotion content, in hex format.

resParams.name: endProductUrl
resParams.description: URL of the product linked to the promotion.

resParams.name: message
resParams.description: A message that describes the status of the request.

	"status": "SUCCESS",

		"description": "Slash sale on all fruits",

}

apis.heading: Delete Promotion
apis.description: The Delete Promotion by ID API allows users to remove a specific promotion by its unique promotion ID. This API permanently deletes the promotion and its associated data, ensuring that it is no longer active or visible.

resParams.name: status
resParams.description: Status of the request, indicated as either 'SUCCESS' or 'ERROR'.

resParams.name: message
resParams.description: A message that describes the status of the request.
